name: PDF Bible Exporter (WASM)
description: Generate formatted PDF 'bibles' — character sheets, world guides, campaign summaries — from entity markdown with custom templates and print-ready formatting.
author: BiloxiStudios

studio_name.label: Studio Name
studio_name.description: Studio name displayed in export headers and footers

studio_logo_url.label: Studio Logo URL
studio_logo_url.description: URL or path to studio logo image for export branding

primary_color.label: Primary Color
primary_color.description: Primary accent color for exports (hex code)

secondary_color.label: Secondary Color
secondary_color.description: Secondary accent color for exports (hex code)

include_images.label: Include Images
include_images.description: Embed entity portraits and images in exports

page_size.label: Page Size
page_size.description: PDF page size: A4 or Letter

custom_css.label: Custom CSS
custom_css.description: Additional CSS injected into export templates
